title: Polystichum × lonchitiforme
taxonomy: Polystichum × lonchitiforme is a hybrid species within the Polystichum genus, which belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is part of the fern group and is often classified as a member of the Pteridophyta division. As a hybrid species, Polystichum × lonchitiforme combines characteristics from its parent species, Polystichum lonchitis and Polystichum setiferum. The classification of this plant allows for its identification and separation from other fern species within the same genus. Through its classification, Polystichum × lonchitiforme can be distinguished based on its unique morphological and genetic features.

intro: Polystichum × lonchitiforme is a hybrid fern species, resulting from the cross between Polystichum tsus-sacramentum and Polystichum lonchitis. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and improve overall well-being.
